{% extends 'layouts/admin_base.html' %} {% from 'components/page_header.html' import page_header %} {% from 'components/button.html' import button %} {% from 'components/card.html' import card, card_content %} {% from 'components/input.html' import label %} {% block title %}Create Vendor{% endblock %} {% block content %}
{{ page_header( title='Create Vendor', description='Add a new vendor to the catalog', actions=[ {'text': 'Back to Vendors', 'icon': 'arrow-left', 'href': url_for('application_mgmt.vendors_dashboard'), 'variant': 'outline'} ] ) }} {% call card() %} {% call card_content() %}
{% call label(for='name', required=true) %}Vendor Name{% endcall %}
{% call label(for='vendor_type') %}Vendor Type{% endcall %}
{% call label(for='description') %}Description{% endcall %}
{% call label(for='website') %}Website{% endcall %}
{% call label(for='headquarters_location') %}Headquarters Location{% endcall %}
Cancel {{ button('Create Vendor', variant='default', type='submit', icon='plus') }}
{% endcall %} {% endcall %}
{% endblock %}
